name: Ratatouille Nicoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the zucchini and eggplant, then cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. Cut the tomatoes and onions into bite-sized pieces.
3. Remove the seeds and membrane from the green peppers and cut into bite-sized pieces.
4. Brown the vegetables separately in a large pan, sautéing over medium to high heat.
- Start with the onions and peppers. Once each is browned, combine them together in one pan and continue cooking slowly, covered.
- Add the bay leaf, salt, and pepper at this time.
5. Cook the eggplant next, followed by the zucchini, then the tomatoes with the garlic.
6. In a large pan, combine all ingredients and cook for 10 minutes.
7. Serve warm.
NOTE: Cooking time is approximately a half-hour for all the vegetables. They are cooked separately to prevent water absorption. Ratatouille should not be mushy.
Nutrition analysis per serving: 182 calories; 14 grams fat; 0 milligrams cholesterol; 10.3 milligrams sodium; 66% of calories from fat.
